mapper.select: SELECT id, userid, password, name, email, reg_date FROM tbl_member ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, userid, password, name, email, reg_date FROM tbl_member WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_member ( userid, password, name, email ) VALUES ( #{userid}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_member SET userid = #{userid}, password = #{password}, name = #{name}, email = #{email} WHERE id = #{id}
